name: @parvalon/subgraph
description: The Graph subgraph indexing Parvalon CAE-1 events (CorporateActionRegistry + DividendDistributor) for fast, scalable corporate-action & dividend queries.

scripts.deploy:local: graph deploy --node http://localhost:8020/ --ipfs http://localhost:5001 --network local corporax/corporax
scripts.deploy:robinhood: graph deploy --node http://localhost:8020/ --ipfs http://localhost:5001 --network robinhood corporax/corporax
